title: Very Edible Foods
description: Adds a bunch of very safe and normal food items!
body:
# Very Edible Foods

## Overview
A new mod that I made from boredom, and it simply adds a bunch of random and humorous food items to the game, with some very strange side effects! Feel free to suggest more food items and report bugs on the GitHub page!

## Extra Notes
This was made with MCreator since I don't know how to code ;-;

When I learn how to properly code, I will likely remake the mod with proper code.
